items.title: From notebook prototype to production
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR A[Explore in notebook
cells + Markdown] --> B[Stabilize logic] B --> C[Extract to .py module
importable + testable] C --> D[Add tests] C --> E[Reuse in pipeline / app] A -.strip outputs.-> F[(Version control)] C --> F
items.caption: Notebooks are for exploration; once logic stabilizes, extract it into tested modules and keep outputs out of version control.
